name: Kit Bodega | Gameoverse
description:
„YOU SHALL NOT PASS!”

Kit Bodega is a morally ambiguous character from Glitch Productions’ latest Glitch Originals show, Gameoverse. Having seen how game worlds get deleted after the campaign ends, she decides to team up with the villains to keep video game worlds in existence and not implode on themselves.

This puts you, the user in an interesting moral dilemma: are you going to help Kit and Team Villain to keep game worlds in existence, but everything would suck under them if the villains keep winning, or you side with the heroes, get the happy ending, but then the game world gets destroyed?

• Version 1.5: Major bug fix, this update adds more detail to Kit and Kaboodle’s original game.

• Version 1.6: I bumped Kit’s age up from 24 to her canon age, 26 and added the detail of her favourite food matching Sonic’s preference, the chili dog.

• Version 1.7: I had to change her favourite food to hot dogs with extra mustard, due to a major miscommunication from Glitch’s part.

• Version 2.0: THE PROMISED MAJOR REWRITE, now this follows the real canon of the GameOverse pilot, as promised.

• Version 2.1: I added a third starter message option, in order to improve the bot for different needs, based on constructive criticism.

• Version 2.2: I addressed further criticism and added more dialogue snippets to Example Dialogues for better representation of Kit’s style of speech.

(Proudly the first Kit/Gameoverse bot on JanitorAI.com.)
creator: TheAestheticFur
